indices.name: S&P 500
indices.original_text: The S&P 500 fell 29.98 points, or 0.4%, to 6,939.03. The main stock market index of United States, the US500, fell to 6944 points on January 30, 2026, losing 0.35% from the previous session. Over the past month, the index has climbed 1.44% and is up 14.96% compared to the same time last year.

sources.name: Associated Press / KVUE

indices.name: KOSPI
indices.original_text: South Korea's main stock market index, the KOSPI, rose to 5224 points on January 30, 2026, gaining 0.06% from the previous session. The KOSPI set another all-time high, closed at 5,224.36, up 3.11 points (0.06%) from the previous day. This marks the highest closing level in KOSPI history.

sources.name: Trading Economics
sources.original_text: South Korea's main stock market index, the KOSPI, rose to 5224 points on January 30, 2026, gaining 0.06% from the previous session. Over the past month, the index has climbed 21.23% and is up 107.53% compared to the same time last year.

sources.name: Asia Business Daily
sources.original_text: On January 30, the KOSPI closed at 5,224.36, up 3.11 points (0.06%) from the previous day. This marks the highest closing level in KOSPI history.

indices.name: KOSDAQ
indices.original_text: The KOSDAQ index closed at 1,149.44, down 14.97 points or 1.29 percent. The KOSDAQ index soared 25.8% this month compared to the previous month. This is the first time in 25 years, since January 2001, that the KOSDAQ index has surged more than 25% in a single month.
